data.title: Planet Evening News
Bitcoin Price Movements Could Trigger Significant Liquidations on Major Exchanges
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass indicates that if Bitcoin surpasses $86,000, the cumulative liquidation intensity of short positions on major centralized exchanges (CEX) will reach $577 million. Conversely, if Bitcoin falls below $83,000, the cumulative liquidation intensity of long positions on these exchanges will amount to $1.522 billion.

BlockBeats notes that the liquidation chart does not precisely display the number of contracts pending liquidation or the exact value of liquidated contracts. Instead, the chart's bars represent the relative importance of each liquidation cluster compared to nearby clusters, indicating intensity.

Therefore, the liquidation chart illustrates the extent to which the target price reaching a certain level will be affected. A higher "liquidation bar" suggests that once the price reaches that level, there will be a stronger reaction due to a wave of liquidity.

data.title: GoPlus: Completed the fourth batch of GPS repurchases, with a total repurchase volume of 136,695,331 pieces
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News GoPlus announced on the X platform that it has completed the fourth batch of GPS token repurchases. As of now, the total repurchased tokens have reached about 136,695,331. GoPlus said that the repurchase is still in progress, and after the repurchase is completed, all purchased tokens will be destroyed together.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 590 USDT with a 0.14% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 13, 2025, 11:09 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 590 USDT and is now trading at 589.880005 USDT, with a narrowed 0.14% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Richard Teng：Enterprises Are Turning Attention Beyond Traditional Reserves, With Bitcoin And Digital Assets Set to Become A Major Focus
data.description: Binance CEO Richard Teng posted on X, saying that the financial playbook is changing. More companies are  looking beyond traditional reserves, with Bitcoin and digital assets stepping into the spotlight.As adoption grows, so does their impact.

data.title: Bitpanda receives MiCAR license from Austrian Financial Market Authority
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Digital asset platform Bitpanda announced that it has obtained the Crypto Asset Market Regulatory License (MiCAR) issued by the Austrian Financial Market Authority (FMA). This is the third MiCAR license obtained by Bitpanda after similar approvals in Germany and Malta. It intends to promote regulatory compliance in the crypto field in the European market. (News.bitcoin)

data.title: El Salvador's President Nayib Bukele to Meet with U.S. President Donald Trump in Washington
data.description: According to Odaily, El Salvador's President Nayib Bukele has arrived in the United States to meet with U.S. President Donald Trump. The meeting, scheduled for April 14 at the White House, will focus on discussions regarding bilateral cooperation and diplomatic relations between the two nations.

data.title: Executive Director of Trump’s Digital Asset Advisory Committee: Accumulate quickly before BTC becomes expensive
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bo Hines, executive director of the Trump Digital Asset Advisory Committee, said in an interview: "We need to accumulate Bitcoin quickly before it becomes more expensive." (Cointelegraph)

data.title: White House Urges Swift Bitcoin Accumulation
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Bo Hines, the Executive Director of the White House Presidential Digital Assets Task Force, emphasized the urgency of accumulating Bitcoin before its value increases significantly. Hines highlighted the importance of acting promptly to secure Bitcoin assets, reflecting the administration's proactive stance on digital currency investments.

data.title: Solana Triggers Long Thesis After Pushing Above $125 – Start Of A Bigger Rally?
data.description:
Solana is trading above the $125 mark after bulls stepped in with force, reclaiming critical technical levels and bringing some relief to a market that had been dominated by selling pressure. After weeks of steep declines and heightened volatility, Solana is finally showing signs of strength as buyers return and confidence starts to rebuild. Related Reading: Dogecoin Whales Buy Over 80 Million DOGE In 24 Hours – Sign Of Recovery​? The bounce came at a crucial moment, as SOL was on the verge of breaking into lower demand zones following a sharp 47% drop since early March. The shift in momentum has caught the attention of market participants, especially as broader market sentiment begins to stabilize
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/solana/solana-triggers-long-thesis-after-pushing-above-125-start-of-a-bigger-rally/
